# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [AnalysisFilter Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-analysisfilter.html): The logic layer responsible for refining raw dead code candidates based on project-specific rules and git diffs. Architectural overview of the AnalysisFilter domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ContextDiscovery — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-contextdiscovery.html): Determines the current git context and PR change sets. Architecture documentation for the ContextDiscovery subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [EntryOrchestration — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-entryorchestration.html): Manages the high-level execution flow logic in the index script. Architecture documentation for the EntryOrchestration subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-githubaction.html): The core entry point and integration layer that orchestrates the execution of the dead code analysis within the GitHub Actions environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [InputHandling — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-inputhandling.html): Parses YAML inputs and environment configuration for the action run. Architecture documentation for the InputHandling subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [MockFactories — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-mockfactories.html): Creates consistent test data for candidates and analysis responses. Architecture documentation for the MockFactories subdomain (part of Testing domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Reporting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-reporting.html): Handles the generation and formatting of human-readable feedback, primarily targeting GitHub PR comments. Architectural overview of the Reporting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Testing Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-testing.html): Ensures the reliability of the analysis logic and reporting via unit and integration tests using Vitest. Architectural overview of the Testing domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/file-src-dead-code-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [escapeTableCell() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-markdown-ts-escapetablecell.html): Architecture documentation for the escapeTableCell() function in markdown.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [filterByChangedFiles() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-dead-code-ts-filterbychangedfiles.html): Architecture documentation for the filterByChangedFiles() function in dead-code.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.

- [getChangedFiles() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-getchangedfiles.html): Architecture documentation for the getChangedFiles() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
